openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Agentic Control Plane API
  version: 0.2.0
  summary: Policy, approval, execution, and audit APIs for governed agent actions
  description: |
    v0.2 extends the base control-plane lifecycle with richer, domain-specific schemas for:
      - Git and pull request actions
      - Deploy and cloud actions
      - Email and calendar actions
      - Payment and procurement actions

    Core lifecycle:
      intent -> policy decision -> approval (optional) -> execution grant -> execution -> trace

servers:
  - url: https://api.withaileron.ai
    description: Production

security:
  - bearerAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Auth
  - name: Enterprises
  - name: Users
  - name: Intents
  - name: Approvals
  - name: Policies
  - name: Connectors
  - name: Executions
  - name: Funding Sources
  - name: Credentials
  - name: Traces
  - name: Analytics
  - name: MCP Servers
  - name: Health

paths:
  /v1/health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Get service health
      operationId: getHealth
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service health
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /auth/{provider}/login:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Initiate OAuth login
      description: Redirects the user to the specified auth provider's consent screen.
      operationId: authLogin
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            examples: [google, okta]
      responses:
        "307":
          description: Redirect to auth provider
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"

  /auth/{provider}/callback:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: OAuth callback
      description: |
        Handles the OAuth callback from the auth provider. Exchanges the
        authorization code for user identity, creates or looks up the user
        and enterprise, issues session tokens, and redirects to the UI.
      operationId: authCallback
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: code
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: state
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "307":
          description: Redirect to UI with session cookies set
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /auth/refresh:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Refresh access token
      description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token. The refresh token is rotated.
      operationId: authRefresh
      security: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: New access token
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Log out
      description: Deletes the session and clears authentication cookies.
      operationId: authLogout
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Logged out
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/LogoutResponse"

  /v1/enterprises/me:
    get:
      tags: [Enterprises]
      summary: Get current enterprise
      description: Returns the enterprise for the authenticated user.
      operationId: getCurrentEnterprise
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current enterprise
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Enterprise"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /v1/users/me:
    get:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Get current user
      description: Returns the authenticated user's profile.
      operationId: getCurrentUser
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /v1/intents:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Submit a new action intent
      operationId: createIntent
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateIntentRequest"
            examples:
              gitPullRequest:
                summary: Create a pull request
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_codex_repo_alpha"
                  workspace_id: "ws_engineering"
                  action:
                    type: "git.pull_request.create"
                    summary: "Open PR from feature branch to main"
                    justification: "Ship checkout bug fix"
                    target:
                      kind: "repository"
                      id: "repo_checkout"
                      display_name: "github.com/acme/checkout"
                    domain:
                      git:
                        provider: "github"
                        repository: "acme/checkout"
                        branch: "fix/checkout-tax-rounding"
                        base_branch: "main"
                        commit_shas:
                          - "abc1234"
                        files_changed:
                          - "src/tax.ts"
                          - "tests/tax.test.ts"
                        pr_title: "Fix tax rounding on checkout"
                        pr_body: "This PR fixes checkout tax rounding and adds regression tests."
                        labels: ["bugfix", "checkout"]
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "codex"
              paymentPurchase:
                summary: Purchase SaaS subscription
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_procurement_ops"
                  workspace_id: "ws_finops"
                  action:
                    type: "payment.charge"
                    summary: "Purchase annual Figma license"
                    justification: "Renew expiring seat for jane@company.com"
                    target:
                      kind: "vendor"
                      id: "vendor_figma"
                      display_name: "Figma"
                    domain:
                      payment:
                        vendor_name: "Figma"
                        amount:
                          amount: 18000
                          currency: "USD"
                        merchant_category: "software"
                        budget_code: "design-software"
                        funding_source_id: "fs_team_software"
                        payment_instrument_preference: "virtual_card"
                        line_items:
                          - description: "Figma Pro Annual"
                            quantity: 1
                            unit_amount:
                              amount: 18000
                              currency: "USD"
                        beneficiary:
                          email: "jane@company.com"
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "openclaw"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Intent created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: List intents
      operationId: listIntents
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        - name: action_type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: agent_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paginated intents
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentListResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Get an intent
      operationId: getIntent
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Intent details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}/evidence:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Attach evidence to an intent
      operationId: appendIntentEvidence
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppendEvidenceRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Evidence appended
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/approvals:
    get:
      tags: [Approvals]
      summary: List approval requests
      operationId: listApprovals
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: assignee
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Approval queue

            application/json:

                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalListResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":

  /v1/mcp-servers:
    get:

      operationId: listMCPServers
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of MCP server configurations
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  items:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"
    post:
      tags: [MCP Servers]
      summary: Register a downstream MCP server
      operationId: createMCPServer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Server registered
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"

  /v1/mcp-servers/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema:
          type: string
    get:
      tags: [MCP Servers]
      summary: Get MCP server configuration
      operationId: getMCPServer
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Server configuration
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"
    put:
      tags: [MCP Servers]
      summary: Update MCP server configuration
      operationId: updateMCPServer
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Server updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"
    delete:
      tags: [MCP Servers]
      summary: Remove a downstream MCP server
      operationId: deleteMCPServer
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Server removed

  /v1/mcp-servers/{id}/credentials:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        schema: { type: string }
    post:
      tags: [MCP Servers]
      summary: Store a credential for an MCP server
      operationId: setMCPServerCredential
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SetCredentialRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Credential stored
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SetCredentialResponse"
        "404":
          description: Server not found

  /v1/marketplace/servers:
    get:
      tags: [Marketplace]
      summary: Browse the MCP server marketplace
      operationId: listMarketplaceServers
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          required: false
          schema: { type: string }
          description: Search query to filter servers by name or description
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of marketplace servers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  items:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketplaceServer"

  /v1/marketplace/servers/{registryId}/install:
    parameters:
      - name: registryId
        in: path
        required: true
        schema: { type: string }
        description: Registry identifier (e.g. io.github.user/server)
    post:
      tags: [Marketplace]
      summary: Install an MCP server from the marketplace
      operationId: installMarketplaceServer
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Server installed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/InstallResult"
        "404":
          description: Server not found in registry

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Conflict:
      description: Conflict with current resource state
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]
        account_id:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

    CalendarAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [google_calendar, outlook, custom]
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      description: |
        Carries action-type-specific fields. Exactly one field must be populated,
        corresponding to the prefix of ActionIntent.type:
          - git.* → git
          - deploy.* → deploy
          - cloud.* → cloud
          - email.* → email
          - calendar.* → calendar
          - payment.* → payment
          - procurement.* → procurement
        The server rejects requests where the populated domain field does not
        match the action type prefix.
      minProperties: 1
      maxProperties: 1
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:
          type: string
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionTarget"
        domain:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DomainAction"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    IntentContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        environment:
          type: string
          examples: [development, staging, production]
        source_platform:
          type: string
          examples: [openclaw, claude_code, codex, openhands, goose, cline, continue, langgraph, custom]
        source_session_id:
          type: string
        source_trace_id:
          type: string
        ip_address:
          type: string
        risk_hints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        user_present:
          type: boolean
        temporary_grant_id:
          type: string

    CreateIntentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [idempotency_key, agent_id, workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        idempotency_key:
          type: string
        agent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        callback_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: |
            Optional webhook URL. The control plane will POST status updates
            to this URL as the intent progresses through the lifecycle
            (policy evaluated, approval requested, approved/denied, execution
            started, execution completed). This avoids the need for agents
            to poll the GET /v1/intents/{id} endpoint.

    EvidenceItem:
      type: object
      required: [type, value]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [text, link, diff_summary, screenshot_ref, receipt_ref, test_result, change_ticket, artifact_ref, custom]
        label:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string

    AppendEvidenceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [evidence]
      properties:
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"

    PolicyMatch:
      type: object
      properties:
        policy_id: { type: string }
        policy_version: { type: integer }
        rule_id: { type: string }
        explanation: { type: string }

    Decision:
      type: object
      required: [disposition, risk_level]
      properties:
        disposition:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DecisionDisposition"
        risk_level:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/RiskLevel"
        matched_policies:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyMatch"
        requires_approval:
          type: boolean
        approval_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        denial_reason:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [intent_id, status, workspace_id, agent, action, decision, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        agent:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    IntentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApprovalActor:
      type: object
      required: [principal_id]
      properties:
        principal_id:
          type: string
        display_name:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, approved, denied, delegated]

    Approval:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, intent_id, status, requested_at, approvers]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        rationale:
          type: string
        approvers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalActor"
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        requested_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        resolved_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        editable_bounds:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Approval"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ApproveRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        approve_once:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        step_up_auth_assertion:
          type: string

    DenyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [reason]
      properties:
        reason:
          type: string
        comment:
          type: string

    ModifyApprovalRequest:
      type: object
      required: [modifications]
      properties:
        comment:
          type: string
        modifications:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ApprovalActionResponse:
      type: object
      required: [approval_id, status]
      properties:
        approval_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalStatus"
        intent_status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    PolicyCondition:
      type: object
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        operator:
          type: string
          enum: [eq, neq, in, not_in, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, matches]
        value:
          oneOf:
            - type: string
            - type: number
            - type: integer
            - type: boolean
            - type: array
              items: {}

    ApprovalRequirement:
      type: object
      properties:
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [single, any_of_group, all_of_group, quorum]
        approver_group_id:
          type: string
        quorum_count:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1

    PolicyRule:
      type: object
      required: [rule_id, effect]
      properties:
        rule_id:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        conditions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyCondition"
        effect:
          type: string
          enum: [allow, deny, require_approval, allow_with_modification]
        approval_requirement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ApprovalRequirement"
        modifications_template:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        priority:
          type: integer
          default: 100

    Policy:
      type: object
      required: [policy_id, name, workspace_id, status, version, rules]
      properties:
        policy_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        version:
          type: integer
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CreatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, name, rules]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    UpdatePolicyRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyStatus"
        rules:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyRule"

    PolicyListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Policy"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    PolicySimulationRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"

    PolicySimulationResponse:
      type: object
      required: [decision]
      properties:
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"

    ConnectorAuth:
      type: object
      required: [method]
      properties:
        method:
          type: string
          enum: [oauth2, api_key_ref, service_account_ref, webhook_secret_ref, custom]
        reference_id:
          type: string
        scopes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    Connector:
      type: object
      required: [connector_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        connector_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled, error]
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        policy_ids:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, auth]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorType"
        name:
          type: string
        provider:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    UpdateConnectorRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        auth:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ConnectorAuth"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ConnectorListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Connector"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    ExecutionGrant:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id, intent_id, status, expires_at]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, consumed, revoked, expired]
        bounded_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    ExecutionRunRequest:
      type: object
      required: [grant_id]
      properties:
        grant_id:
          type: string
        override_parameters:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ExecutionRunResponse:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, status]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running]
        accepted_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Execution:
      type: object
      required: [execution_id, intent_id, status, started_at]
      properties:
        execution_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        connector_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [accepted, running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        started_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        finished_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true

    ExecutionCallbackRequest:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        output:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        receipt_ref:
          type: string
        error_message:
          type: string

    FundingSource:
      type: object
      required: [funding_source_id, workspace_id, type, name, status]
      properties:
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, disabled]
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          properties:
            max_single_transaction:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
            allowed_merchants:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            allowed_categories:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateFundingSourceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card_pool, budget, fiat_account_ref, lightning_wallet_ref, btc_wallet_ref, stored_balance]
        name:
          type: string
        currency:
          type: string
        spending_controls:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    FundingSourceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/FundingSource"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    CredentialReference:
      type: object
      required: [credential_id, workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        credential_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CreateCredentialRequest:
      type: object
      required: [workspace_id, type, name, vault_path]
      properties:
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [api_key, oauth_refresh_token, service_account, webhook_secret, custom]
        name:
          type: string
        vault_path:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    CredentialListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CredentialReference"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    TraceEvent:
      type: object
      required: [event_id, event_type, actor, timestamp]
      properties:
        event_id:
          type: string
        event_type:
          type: string
        actor:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        payload:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Trace:
      type: object
      required: [trace_id, intent_id, events]
      properties:
        trace_id:
          type: string
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        events:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TraceEvent"

    TraceListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Trace"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

    AnalyticsSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        totals:
          type: object
          properties:
            intents: { type: integer }
            approvals_requested: { type: integer }
            approvals_granted: { type: integer }
            denials: { type: integer }
            executions_succeeded: { type: integer }
            executions_failed: { type: integer }
        spend:
          type: object
          properties:
            total_minor_units: { type: integer }
            currency: { type: string }
        approval_latency_ms:
          type: object
          properties:
            p50: { type: integer }
            p95: { type: integer }
        by_risk_level:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: integer

    MCPServerConfig:
      type: object
      required: [name, command]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          readOnly: true
        name:
          type: string
          description: Unique identifier for this server
        description:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable description of this server
        command:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Command to execute
        env:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string
          description: Environment variables (vault:// prefix for vault resolution)
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [local, remote]
          default: local
          description: Execution mode (local subprocess or remote HTTP)
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [stopped, running, error]
          readOnly: true
          description: Current server status (set by the system)
        version:
          type: string
          description: Installed version of the server
        registry_id:
          type: string
          description: MCP Registry identifier if installed from marketplace
        policy_mapping:
          type: object
          properties:
            tool_prefix:
              type: string
              description: Maps tool calls to action type namespace
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          readOnly: true
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          readOnly: true

    SetCredentialRequest:
      type: object
      required: [env_var_name, secret_value]
      properties:
        env_var_name:
          type: string
          description: Environment variable name
        secret_value:
          type: string
          description: Secret value to store in the vault

    SetCredentialResponse:
      type: object
      required: [env_var_name, stored]
      properties:
        env_var_name:
          type: string
        stored:
          type: boolean

    MarketplaceServer:
      type: object
      required: [registry_id, name]
      properties:
        registry_id:
          type: string
          description: Unique registry identifier (reverse DNS)
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        installed:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether this server is already installed locally
        versions:
          type: array
          description: Available versions, ordered by most recent first
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/MarketplaceServerVersion"

    MarketplaceServerVersion:
      type: object
      required: [version]
      properties:
        version:
          type: string
        required_env_vars:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequiredEnvVar"

    RequiredEnvVar:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        required:
          type: boolean

    InstallResult:
      type: object
      required: [server]
      properties:
        server:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/MCPServerConfig"
        required_credentials:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequiredEnvVar"

    # --- Auth & Account schemas ---

    Enterprise:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, slug, plan, billing_email, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          examples: [ent_abc123]
        name:
          type: string
        slug:
          type: string
          description: URL-friendly unique identifier
        plan:
          type: string
          enum: [free, pro, enterprise]
        personal:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: True for single-user personal accounts (e.g. Gmail sign-in)
        billing_email:
          type: string
          format: email
        sso_required:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        allowed_auth_providers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Restrict sign-in to these providers. Empty means all allowed.
        allowed_email_domains:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Restrict sign-in to these email domains. Empty means all allowed.
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    User:
      type: object
      description: |
        A user account. The user's email address is their unique identifier (id),
        ensuring a stable identity across OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, X, etc.).
      required: [id, enterprise_id, display_name, role, status, auth_provider, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: Email address — the unique identifier for the user
          examples: [alice@example.com]
        enterprise_id:
          type: string
        display_name:
          type: string
        avatar_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [owner, admin, member]
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, invited, suspended]
        auth_provider:
          type: string
          description: Identity provider used for authentication (e.g. google, okta, saml)
        last_login_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    RefreshTokenRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        refresh_token:
          type: string
          description: Refresh token (alternatively sent via httpOnly cookie)

    RefreshTokenResponse:
      type: object
      required: [access_token]
      properties:
        access_token:
          type: string

    LogoutResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [logged_out]

lines: -        A user account. The user's email address is their unique identifier (id),

content.text:
All passing. The model is now:

- **`User.ID`** — `usr_` + UUID, immutable surrogate key, used in all FKs/sessions/logs
- **`User.Email`** — unique column with index, the deduplication key across OAuth providers
- **JWT `Subject`** — the surrogate `usr_` ID (not the email); email carried separately in claims

message.content: So now, users can still log in through various sources like Google, x.com, Github, etc - but if those services are tied to the same email address, the user will always log into the same account, correct? And email is enforced in the user table as a unique field?

content.text:
Correct on both counts.

1. **Same email = same account.** The callback handler calls `GetByProviderSubject` first (fast path for returning users), but for new sign-ins from a different provider, it would fall through to `GetByEmail` to find the existing user. Right now though — let me verify that fallback is actually wired up.

As I suspected — there's a gap. When `GetByProviderSubject` returns not-found, we immediately create a new user. But if the same email already exists via a different provider (e.g. user signed in with Google first, now tries GitHub), this would try to create a duplicate and fail on the unique email constraint.

Let me fix this to add the email fallback lookup.

content.content: The file /Users/alr/git/ALRubinger/aileron/core/auth/handler.go has been updated successfully.

lines: +  // Look up user: first by provider+subject (fast path for returning users),
+  // then by email (handles sign-in via a new provider for an existing account).
+    // Provider subject not seen before — check if the email already exists.
-    // New user — auto-create enterprise and user.
+    // Entirely new user — auto-create enterprise and user.

content.text:
Good catch calling it out. The lookup chain is now:

1. `GetByProviderSubject(google, sub_123)` — fast path for returning users on the same provider
2. If not found → `GetByEmail(alice@example.com)` — catches the case where the same person signs in via a new provider (e.g. first Google, now GitHub)
3. If still not found → create new Enterprise + User

And yes, `email` is enforced as unique in the database via `idx_users_email` (unique index), so a duplicate can never slip through.

message.content: We also need a flow where users can sign up and log in with a username/password. Make sure that we are hashing the password with a unique salt, and storing the salt. Verify my direction against consensus security practices. When a user creates an account with an email address and not through an OAuth provider, we need to email them a confirmation code that they must verify before they can activate their account.

content.text:
Your direction is solid. Let me check it against consensus and note one adjustment.

**Password hashing:** You said hash + unique salt, stored separately. That's the pre-2012 approach. Modern consensus is to use **bcrypt** (or argon2id), which embeds the salt directly in the output string — no separate salt column needed. bcrypt is the Go standard (`golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt`), widely audited, and handles salt generation, work factor, and constant-time comparison internally. Storing a separate salt column is unnecessary and adds a footprint for no benefit.

**Email verification flow:** Your direction is correct — unverified accounts should not be usable. The consensus pattern is:

1. User submits email + password → account created with `status: pending_verification`
2. Server generates a short-lived, single-use verification code (6-digit numeric or token)
3. Server emails the code
4. User submits the code → status flips to `active`
5. Codes expire (e.g. 15 minutes) and can be re-requested

**My recommendation:**
- **bcrypt** for password hashing (no separate salt column)
- **`pending_verification`** status added to the user model
- New `auth_provider` value: `"email"` for password-based accounts
- New store: verification codes (code hash, user ID, expires_at)
- New endpoints: `POST /auth/signup`, `POST /auth/verify-email`, `POST /auth/login`
- Email sending behind an SPI (so we can swap Mailgun/SES/SMTP later)

The one thing we need to defer or stub is the actual email delivery — we'll need a `Notifier` or `Mailer` SPI. Should I define the SPI now with a log-based implementation (prints the code to server logs for dev), and we wire a real email provider later?

message.content: Yes, use bcrypt. Yes, stub the SPI and we'll add a provider later.

1→// Package model — Enterprise, User, Session, and SSO types for the hosted
     2→// control plane. These complement the agent-facing types in model.go.
     3→package model
     4→
     5→import "time"
     6→
     7→// EnterprisePlan classifies the billing tier of an enterprise.
     8→type EnterprisePlan string
     9→
    10→const (
    11→	EnterprisePlanFree       EnterprisePlan = "free"
    12→	EnterprisePlanPro        EnterprisePlan = "pro"
    13→	EnterprisePlanEnterprise EnterprisePlan = "enterprise"
    14→)
    15→
    16→// Enterprise is a top-level account for billing, user management, and settings.
    17→// A personal enterprise (Personal == true) is auto-created for users who sign
    18→// in with a personal email (e.g. Gmail) that is not tied to an organization.
    19→type Enterprise struct {
    20→	ID                   string
    21→	Name                 string
    22→	Slug                 string // URL-friendly, unique
    23→	Plan                 EnterprisePlan
    24→	Personal             bool   // true for single-user personal accounts
    25→	BillingEmail         string
    26→	SSORequired          bool
    27→	AllowedAuthProviders []string // e.g. ["google", "okta"]
    28→	AllowedEmailDomains  []string // e.g. ["acme.com"]
    29→	CreatedAt            time.Time
    30→	UpdatedAt            time.Time
    31→}
    32→
    33→// UserRole classifies a user's permissions within an enterprise.
    34→type UserRole string
    35→
    36→const (
    37→	UserRoleOwner  UserRole = "owner"
    38→	UserRoleAdmin  UserRole = "admin"
    39→	UserRoleMember UserRole = "member"
    40→)
    41→
    42→// UserStatus tracks the lifecycle state of a user.
    43→type UserStatus string
    44→
    45→const (
    46→	UserStatusActive    UserStatus = "active"
    47→	UserStatusInvited   UserStatus = "invited"
    48→	UserStatusSuspended UserStatus = "suspended"
    49→)
    50→
    51→// User is an authenticated person associated with an enterprise.
    52→// The ID is an opaque surrogate key (usr_ + UUID). Email is the stable
    53→// logical identity used to deduplicate across OAuth providers — when any
    54→// provider returns an email, we look up or create the user by email.
    55→type User struct {
    56→	ID                    string // usr_ + UUID — immutable surrogate key
    57→	EnterpriseID          string

    59→	DisplayName           string

    63→	AuthProvider          string // e.g. "google", "okta", "saml"

    65→	LastLoginAt           *time.Time
    66→	CreatedAt             time.Time
    67→	UpdatedAt             time.Time
    68→}
    69→
    70→// Session is a login session backed by a refresh token.
    71→type Session struct {
    72→	ID               string
    73→	UserID           string
    74→	TokenHash        string // SHA-256 of access token
    75→	RefreshTokenHash string // SHA-256 of refresh token
    76→	ExpiresAt        time.Time
    77→	CreatedAt        time.Time
    78→}
    79→
    80→// SSOProvider identifies the type of SSO integration.
    81→type SSOProvider string
    82→
    83→const (
    84→	SSOProviderGoogle      SSOProvider = "google"
    85→	SSOProviderOkta        SSOProvider = "okta"
    86→	SSOProviderSAMLGeneric SSOProvider = "saml_generic"
    87→)
    88→
    89→// SSOConfig stores per-enterprise SSO provider configuration.
    90→type SSOConfig struct {
    91→	ID           string
    92→	EnterpriseID string

    94→	ClientID     string // stored encrypted
    95→	IssuerURL    string

// Handler serves the authentication HTTP routes.
type Handler struct {
	log               *slog.Logger
	registry          *Registry
	enforcer          Enforcer
	issuer            *TokenIssuer
	users             store.UserStore
	enterprises       store.EnterpriseStore
	sessions          store.SessionStore
	verificationCodes store.VerificationCodeStore
	mailer            Mailer
	newID             func() string
	uiRedirect        string // URL to redirect to after successful auth
	refreshTTL        time.Duration
	verificationTTL   time.Duration
}

// HandlerConfig configures the auth handler.
type HandlerConfig struct {
	Log               *slog.Logger
	Registry          *Registry
	Enforcer          Enforcer
	Issuer            *TokenIssuer
	Users             store.UserStore
	Enterprises       store.EnterpriseStore
	Sessions          store.SessionStore
	VerificationCodes store.VerificationCodeStore
	Mailer            Mailer
	NewID             func() string
	UIRedirect        string        // e.g. "http://localhost:5173"
	RefreshTTL        time.Duration // e.g. 7 * 24 * time.Hour
	VerificationTTL   time.Duration // e.g. 15 * time.Minute
}

// NewHandler creates an auth handler.
func NewHandler(cfg HandlerConfig) *Handler {
	if cfg.RefreshTTL == 0 {
		cfg.RefreshTTL = 7 * 24 * time.Hour
	}
	if cfg.VerificationTTL == 0 {
		cfg.VerificationTTL = 15 * time.Minute
	}
	if cfg.UIRedirect == "" {
		cfg.UIRedirect = "/"
	}
	return &Handler{
		log:               cfg.Log,
		registry:          cfg.Registry,
		enforcer:          cfg.Enforcer,
		issuer:            cfg.Issuer,
		users:             cfg.Users,
		enterprises:       cfg.Enterprises,
		sessions:          cfg.Sessions,
		verificationCodes: cfg.VerificationCodes,
		mailer:            cfg.Mailer,
		newID:             cfg.NewID,
		uiRedirect:        cfg.UIRedirect,
		refreshTTL:        cfg.RefreshTTL,
		verificationTTL:   cfg.VerificationTTL,
	}
}

// RegisterRoutes registers auth routes on the given mux.
func (h *Handler) RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux) {
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /auth/{provider}/login", h.handleLogin)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /auth/{provider}/callback", h.handleCallback)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/signup", h.handleSignup)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/verify-email", h.handleVerifyEmail)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/login", h.handleEmailLogin)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/refresh", h.handleRefresh)
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /auth/logout", h.handleLogout)
}

enterpriseStore := postgres.NewEnterpriseStore(db)
		userStore := postgres.NewUserStore(db)
		sessionStore := postgres.NewSessionStore(db)

		// Wire stores into apiServer for /me endpoints.
		server.enterprises = enterpriseStore
		server.users = userStore

		tokenIssuer := auth.NewTokenIssuer(
			[]byte(authCfg.JWTSigningKey),
			authCfg.JWTIssuer,
			authCfg.AccessTokenTTL,
		)

		authRegistry := auth.NewRegistry()
		if authCfg.GoogleEnabled() {
			authRegistry.Register(googleauth.New(
				authCfg.GoogleClientID,
				authCfg.GoogleClientSecret,
				authCfg.GoogleRedirectURL,
			))
			log.Info("registered Google OAuth provider")
		}

		enforcer := auth.NewStoreEnforcer(enterpriseStore)

		authHandler := auth.NewHandler(auth.HandlerConfig{
			Log:         log,
			Registry:    authRegistry,
			Enforcer:    enforcer,
			Issuer:      tokenIssuer,
			Users:       userStore,
			Enterprises: enterpriseStore,
			Sessions:    sessionStore,
			NewID:       idGen,
			UIRedirect:  authCfg.UIRedirectURL,
			RefreshTTL:  authCfg.RefreshTokenTTL,
		})
		authHandler.RegisterRoutes(mux)

/auth/signup:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Sign up with email and password
      description: |
        Creates a new account with email and password. The account starts in
        pending_verification status. A 6-digit verification code is sent to
        the email address and must be submitted via /auth/verify-email before
        the account can be used.
      operationId: authSignup
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SignupRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Account created, verification code sent
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SignupResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

  /auth/verify-email:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Verify email address
      description: |
        Submits the 6-digit verification code sent to the user's email.
        On success, the account status changes from pending_verification to active.
      operationId: authVerifyEmail
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerifyEmailRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Email verified, account activated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerifyEmailResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Log in with email and password
      description: Authenticates with email and password and returns an access token.
      operationId: authEmailLogin
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailLoginRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Authenticated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /auth/refresh:

openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Agentic Control Plane API
  version: 0.2.0
  summary: Policy, approval, execution, and audit APIs for governed agent actions
  description: |
    v0.2 extends the base control-plane lifecycle with richer, domain-specific schemas for:
      - Git and pull request actions
      - Deploy and cloud actions
      - Email and calendar actions
      - Payment and procurement actions

    Core lifecycle:
      intent -> policy decision -> approval (optional) -> execution grant -> execution -> trace

servers:
  - url: https://api.withaileron.ai
    description: Production

security:
  - bearerAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Auth
  - name: Enterprises
  - name: Users
  - name: Intents
  - name: Approvals
  - name: Policies
  - name: Connectors
  - name: Executions
  - name: Funding Sources
  - name: Credentials
  - name: Traces
  - name: Analytics
  - name: MCP Servers
  - name: Health

paths:
  /v1/health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Get service health
      operationId: getHealth
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service health
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /auth/{provider}/login:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Initiate OAuth login
      description: Redirects the user to the specified auth provider's consent screen.
      operationId: authLogin
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            examples: [google, okta]
      responses:
        "307":
          description: Redirect to auth provider
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"

  /auth/{provider}/callback:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: OAuth callback
      description: |
        Handles the OAuth callback from the auth provider. Exchanges the
        authorization code for user identity, creates or looks up the user
        and enterprise, issues session tokens, and redirects to the UI.
      operationId: authCallback
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: code
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: state
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "307":
          description: Redirect to UI with session cookies set
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /auth/refresh:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Refresh access token
      description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token. The refresh token is rotated.
      operationId: authRefresh
      security: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: New access token
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /auth/logout:
    post:

      responses:

                summary: Create a pull request
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_codex_repo_alpha"
                  workspace_id: "ws_engineering"
                  action:
                    type: "git.pull_request.create"
                    summary: "Open PR from feature branch to main"
                    justification: "Ship checkout bug fix"
                    target:
                      kind: "repository"
                      id: "repo_checkout"
                      display_name: "github.com/acme/checkout"
                    domain:
                      git:
                        provider: "github"
                        repository: "acme/checkout"
                        branch: "fix/checkout-tax-rounding"
                        base_branch: "main"
                        commit_shas:
                          - "abc1234"
                        files_changed:
                          - "src/tax.ts"
                          - "tests/tax.test.ts"
                        pr_title: "Fix tax rounding on checkout"
                        pr_body: "This PR fixes checkout tax rounding and adds regression tests."
                        labels: ["bugfix", "checkout"]
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "codex"
              paymentPurchase:
                summary: Purchase SaaS subscription
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_procurement_ops"
                  workspace_id: "ws_finops"
                  action:
                    type: "payment.charge"
                    summary: "Purchase annual Figma license"
                    justification: "Renew expiring seat for jane@company.com"
                    target:
                      kind: "vendor"
                      id: "vendor_figma"
                      display_name: "Figma"
                    domain:
                      payment:
                        vendor_name: "Figma"
                        amount:
                          amount: 18000
                          currency: "USD"
                        merchant_category: "software"
                        budget_code: "design-software"
                        funding_source_id: "fs_team_software"
                        payment_instrument_preference: "virtual_card"
                        line_items:
                          - description: "Figma Pro Annual"
                            quantity: 1
                            unit_amount:
                              amount: 18000
                              currency: "USD"
                        beneficiary:
                          email: "jane@company.com"
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "openclaw"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Intent created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
